verified_features: Dashboard: clicking DRAFT/OPEN/LOCKED/LIVE/COMPLETED KPI boxes navigates to Giornate with filter pre-applied
Giornate page has 'Seleziona Lega' dropdown (data-testid='md-league-selector') defaulting to Lega Nazionale
Changing league selector loads matchdays for that league
National league shows creation form + Crea button
Private national league shows read-only message instead of creation form
Status filter dropdown (data-testid='md-status-filter') filters matchdays correctly
Table columns are sortable: # (number), Kickoff, Stato
Control Room button opens modal with 3 tabs: Info & Stato, Partite, Importa da API
Info tab shows counters (Partite, Risultati, Pronostici), ID, Stagione, Kickoff, Meta
Info tab shows state transition buttons based on current status (DRAFT->OPEN->LOCKED->LIVE->COMPLETED)
Info tab Danger Zone: DRAFT without data shows simple delete, otherwise shows Override with DELETE input
Partite tab shows match list with Home, Away, Comp, Market, Time, Score, Status columns
Partite tab has 'Aggiungi Partita' form for manageable leagues
Partite tab has Update and X (delete) buttons for each match
Backend: GET /api/admin/matchdays?league_id={id} returns matchdays for specific league
Backend: POST /api/admin/matchdays with league_id creates matchday for that league
Sidebar no longer shows 'Partite' as separate nav item - matches managed inside Control Room
critical_code_review_comments: All test-ids correctly implemented: md-league-selector, md-status-filter, mdcr-tab-info/matches/import, md-to-{STATUS}, md-delete-btn, md-override-delete-btn
Safe delete logic correctly differentiates DRAFT without data (simple delete) vs has data (override delete)
State machine transitions properly restricted based on current status
League type detection correctly shows/hides creation form based on match_source_type
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test matchday G998 during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Giornate section completely rewritten and tested. Key test-ids: md-league-selector, md-status-filter, mdcr-tab-info/matches/import, md-to-{STATUS}, md-delete-btn, md-override-delete-btn, control-md-{id}. Safe delete logic: DRAFT without data = simple delete, otherwise override DELETE confirmation. League types: national/custom show creation form, private_national shows read-only message. Old 'Partite' nav removed - matches now managed inside matchday Control Room modal.

mocked_api.note: 'Importa da API' tab calls /api/admin/real-fixtures/search which requires API-Football key - tested UI only, not actual API import
